text: Here, in this moment, surrounded by the hum of conversation and the indirect invitation to join, I feel slightly on the periphery—observing, curious, and perhaps a bit disconnected. Yet, stepping into the next room, a space dedicated to research and development, I sense a different energy: wonder mixed with contemplation. The exhibit's design, its wall of text, the artifacts and screens—all urge me to reflect on humanity's pursuit of meaning, connection, and progress. I feel thoughtful and quietly inspired, reminded of the constant dialogue between the past, present, and future.
